query:
INSERT INTO properties (title, description, propertyType, price, priceEur, sizeSqm, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, images, listingType, featured, fazwazUrl) VALUES 
('(273) 2-Bedroom House Mountain Views for Sale Sam Roi Yot TH', 'Single-storey house, offering generous living space of 460 SqM on a 420 SqM plot in the peaceful district of Sam Roi Yot, Hua Hin. This property delivers excellent value at ฿3,500,000 — ideal for buyers seeking a modern home or investment property in one of Thailand''s most scenic and unspoiled coastal areas. The house features 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms with a practical single-storey layout, beautiful mountain views, and a spacious outdoor area perfect for relaxing or entertaining. All pets are welcome, and furniture is negotiable — making this an easy move-in or turn-key investment opportunity.', 'house', 3500000, 95300, 460, 2, '2', JSON_ARRAY('mountainView', 'pets', 'furnished'), JSON_ARRAY('/house_u6081299_main.webp'), 'sale', 0, 'https://www.fazwaz.com/property-sales/2-bedroom-house-for-sale-in-sam-roi-yot-hua-hin-u6081299'),
('(274) 2-Bedroom House Garden + Mountain Views Sam Roi Yot TH', 'Single-storey house, offering a smart and practical 105 SqM layout on a generous 324 SqM plot in the tranquil district of Sam Roi Yot, Hua Hin. Priced at ฿3,000,000, this is an excellent entry point into one of Thailand''s most naturally beautiful and fast-growing areas. The house features 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms with beautiful mountain views and a spacious outdoor area — perfect for gardening, outdoor living, or future development. All pets are welcome, furniture is negotiable, and both water and electricity are billed at government rates, keeping running costs low.', 'house', 3000000, 81700, 105, 2, '2', JSON_ARRAY('mountainView', 'garden', 'pets', 'furnished'), JSON_ARRAY('/house_u6081309_main.webp'), 'sale', 0, 'https://www.fazwaz.com/property-sales/2-bedroom-house-for-sale-in-sam-roi-yot-hua-hin-u6081309')
